decisions.decision: Use Playwright route interception (API mocking) instead of a real backend. Tests intercept /v1/* requests at the browser network layer, so neither the Python server nor the Vite proxy are needed.
alternatives_rejected: Real backend integration: rejected for initial scope due to orchestration overhead (start/stop server, seed data, no reset endpoint). Can be added as a follow-up layer.

decisions.decision: Target Chromium only. The app uses standard React with no browser-specific APIs.
alternatives_rejected: Multi-browser (Firefox + WebKit): rejected for initial scope. One-line config change to add later.

decisions.decision: Place tests in frontend/e2e/ with playwright.config.ts in frontend/. Tests are purely frontend-scoped with mocked APIs.
alternatives_rejected: Top-level e2e/ directory: rejected because no backend orchestration is needed with mocking.

decisions.decision: Use localStorage injection (key='bayes-session') for session setup in most tests. One dedicated test verifies the header input UI flow.
alternatives_rejected: UI interaction for every test: rejected as slower and more brittle.

decisions.decision: WebSocket real-time update testing is out of scope. Tests verify initial HTTP-fetched page state only.
alternatives_rejected: Mock WebSocket servers: rejected for initial scope due to complexity. WS subscriptions are additive to already-loaded data.

decisions.decision: Focus on core trading-relevant sections (~12-16 tests across 4 spec files). Defer BayesNetGraph, JunctionTreePanel, detailed analytics charts.
alternatives_rejected: Comprehensive section coverage (~20+ tests for MarketDetail alone): rejected as overkill for initial happy-path scope.

decisions.decision: Add E2E tests to CI pipeline. With mocked APIs, only Playwright browser install and Vite dev server are needed (no Python backend in CI for E2E).
alternatives_rejected: Local-only tests: rejected because CI ensures tests don't regress silently.

steps.task: Install Playwright as a devDependency in frontend/package.json. Create frontend/playwright.config.ts with: Chromium-only project, baseURL http://localhost:3000, webServer running 'pnpm dev' on port 3000, testDir './e2e', retries 0 locally / 2 in CI. Add 'test:e2e' and 'test:e2e:ui' scripts to package.json.

Create frontend/e2e/fixtures/ directory with shared test infrastructure: (a) mock-data.ts — typed mock responses for /v1/markets, /v1/markets/:id, /v1/account/:id/risk, /v1/account/:id/portfolio, /v1/markets/:id/orders, derived from actual API response shapes in frontend/src/lib/api/client.ts types. (b) test-fixtures.ts — custom Playwright test fixture that extends base test with: session setup via localStorage injection, API route handlers (page.route for /v1/* endpoints returning mock data), and helper to configure account/agent IDs.

Create frontend/e2e/market-list.spec.ts — Tests: (1) page loads and displays market cards, (2) search input filters markets by title, (3) sort dropdown changes market order, (4) status filter shows only matching markets, (5) clicking a market card navigates to /markets/:id.

Create frontend/e2e/market-detail.spec.ts — Tests: (1) page loads and shows market title/description, (2) probability bar displays outcomes with correct values, (3) trading panel is visible with outcome selector and size input, (4) position card shows current position when account has one, (5) P&L section renders for accounts with positions.

Create frontend/e2e/trade-execution.spec.ts — Tests: (1) select an outcome in the trading panel, (2) enter a position size and see cost preview, (3) submit a trade and verify success confirmation/receipt, (4) verify position updates after trade. Mock the POST /v1/markets/:id/orders/* endpoint to return a successful order response.

Create frontend/e2e/portfolio.spec.ts — Tests: (1) page loads with configured account and shows risk metrics (limit, available, utilization, health), (2) positions table displays current positions with market name and P&L, (3) account P&L summary renders correctly, (4) page handles empty portfolio (no positions) gracefully.

Create frontend/e2e/session-navigation.spec.ts — Tests: (1) entering Account ID in header input persists to localStorage, (2) navigation links work (Markets link, Portfolio link), (3) page loads without session configured show appropriate empty/default state.

Update .github/workflows/ci.yml: add a new step after 'Run frontend tests' that installs Playwright Chromium ('npx playwright install --with-deps chromium') and runs 'pnpm --dir frontend test:e2e'. Set timeout-minutes: 5.
Run all E2E tests locally to verify they pass. Fix any flaky selectors or timing issues. Ensure 'pnpm --dir frontend test:e2e' exits cleanly with all tests passing.
